summary: Completed testing of Admin Subscription Management - Eye Button and Renewed Badge features. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verification passed - eye buttons, Renewed badge, and linked users dialog all working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning) - accessibility improvement

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing subscriptions for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin subscription linked users and renewal badge features fully tested. Backend API returns is_renewal (boolean) and linked_users (array with parent/children structure) for each subscription. Frontend shows: (1) Eye icon button in Users column to view linked users, (2) Amber 'Renewed' badge for subscriptions where subscriber has multiple completed subscriptions, (3) Dialog displaying parent with 'Parent' badge and linked children with 'Child' badge. Test data: Alka M (alkabmaheshwari@gmail.com) has is_renewal=true and 2 linked children.
